instruction_changes: Changed 'specific storage structure separation' to 'typed container separate from type-erased lambda storage'
Changed 'weak callback type such as JSCallbackDataWeak' to 'a weak callback type'
Added 'NOT via the old type-erased addAlgorithm path' for Separate Storage Path
Overall: instruction now describes symptom/approach, not exact fix
test_changes: test_weak_ref_replaces_strong: removed specific JSCallbackDataWeak string check; now accepts any weak mechanism (WeakPtr, Weak<>, etc.)
test_thread_safety: expanded lock_member_patterns to accept any lock-like member (Lock, Mutex, shared_mutex, atomic, WTF_GUARDED_BY_LOCK)
test_memory_cost_includes_new_container: changed from checking 'm_abortAlgorithms' to checking for generic 'abort' mention + sizeInBytes pattern
Overall: tests now accept any valid correct fix, not just the gold patch's exact implementation
eval_manifest_changes: Added missing check for test_file_runs_without_error (pr_diff, fail_to_pass)
rubric_fixes: no_solution_leakage: instruction no longer prescribes exact types (JSCallbackDataWeak, specific visitor name, etc.)
instruction_no_hint_leakage: instruction now describes approach (weak callback, typed container, locking) without dictating exact names
solution_uniqueness_guard: tests now accept any valid weak mechanism, any lock-like member, any abort container naming
